questions.question: Write a Python function to read a dataset and perform k-means clustering. Explain the role of each parameter in the k-means algorithm. Provide the dataset used and the number of clusters (k) for the clustering.
questions.hint: Use the Iris dataset for demonstration purposes

questions.question: What is the role of the initialization method in k-means clustering? Explain the difference between 'k-means++' and 'random' initialization methods. Provide a simple Python example to demonstrate the effect of initialization on clustering results.
questions.hint: Use the Iris dataset for demonstration purposes

questions.question: Describe the process of determining the optimal number of clusters (k) in k-means clustering. Explain the common methods used to evaluate cluster quality, such as silhouette score and elbow method. Provide a Python example to demonstrate the use of these methods.
questions.hint: Use the Iris dataset for demonstration purposes
